name: AUDI
description: Founded in 1909 by August Horch, Audi is a German luxury automobile manufacturer that is a part of the Volkswagen Group. The company's name is derived from 'Horch', which means 'listen' in German, and 'Audi' was chosen to avoid legal disputes with his former employer. Audi became known for its grand prix racing successes during the 1930s and the iconic Auto Union cars. After World War II, Audi focused on producing cars for the general public. In 1965, Audi was acquired by Volkswagen Group. Key milestones include the introduction of the quattro permanent four-wheel drive system in 1980, which revolutionized rally racing, and the development of the A8, the world's first automobile with TDI (turbodiesel direct injection) engine in 1994. Today, Audi is known for its innovative technologies, high-performance cars, and luxury vehicles. It produces a wide range of models that cater to various consumer needs.
